birth. I must tell you now as to how long do the planets stay
in a house during their transit. The Sun generally takes one
month, the Moon two days and a quarter. Mars two months.
Mercury one month. Jupiter one year, Venus one month. Saturn
two years and a half and Rahu-Ketu one year and six months.
According to this measure Saturn makes one complete circuit
in 30 years. In the case of short life death takes place in the first
round of Saturn, of medium life in the second round, and of long
life in the third. Now you must be anxious to know when
exactly death is likely "to take place. The following is the method
for finding this : Add up the longitudes of the Sun, Moon,

SPAN OF LIFE 69
Jupiter and Saturn at birth. When Saturn passes through the
position indicated by this sum in one of his rounds death is
likely to overtake the native. If you add up the figures for these
planets in the given chart you will get 4-0-50-46.
I am giving below some more Yogas for infant mortality
